title: Everybody, Always
author: Bob Goff
subline: What if you loved everybody the way Jesus does?
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A huge crowd of tiny figures, each a simple stick-person circle. All ash. ONE is solid red — the one who is loved-by / loves-everyone. Title overlay above. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)">
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <g><circle cx="-540" cy="-200" r="6"/><line x1="-540" y1="-194" x2="-540" y2="-170" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-540" y1="-180" x2="-552" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-540" y1="-180" x2="-528" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="-460" cy="-260" r="6"/><line x1="-460" y1="-254" x2="-460" y2="-230" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-460" y1="-240" x2="-472" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-460" y1="-240" x2="-448" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="-380" cy="-160" r="6"/><line x1="-380" y1="-154" x2="-380" y2="-130" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-380" y1="-140" x2="-392" y2="-128" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-380" y1="-140" x2="-368" y2="-128" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="-300" cy="-280" r="6"/><line x1="-300" y1="-274" x2="-300" y2="-250" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-300" y1="-260" x2="-312" y2="-248" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-300" y1="-260" x2="-288" y2="-248" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="-220" cy="-200" r="6"/><line x1="-220" y1="-194" x2="-220" y2="-170" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-220" y1="-180" x2="-232" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-220" y1="-180" x2="-208" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="-140" cy="-260" r="6"/><line x1="-140" y1="-254" x2="-140" y2="-230" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-140" y1="-240" x2="-152" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-140" y1="-240" x2="-128" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="-60" cy="-180" r="6"/><line x1="-60" y1="-174" x2="-60" y2="-150" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-60" y1="-160" x2="-72" y2="-148" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="-60" y1="-160" x2="-48" y2="-148" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="20" cy="-260" r="6"/><line x1="20" y1="-254" x2="20" y2="-230" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="20" y1="-240" x2="8" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="20" y1="-240" x2="32" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="100" cy="-200" r="6"/><line x1="100" y1="-194" x2="100" y2="-170" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="100" y1="-180" x2="88" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="100" y1="-180" x2="112" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="180" cy="-280" r="6"/><line x1="180" y1="-274" x2="180" y2="-250" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="180" y1="-260" x2="168" y2="-248" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="180" y1="-260" x2="192" y2="-248" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="260" cy="-160" r="6"/><line x1="260" y1="-154" x2="260" y2="-130" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="260" y1="-140" x2="248" y2="-128" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="260" y1="-140" x2="272" y2="-128" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="340" cy="-260" r="6"/><line x1="340" y1="-254" x2="340" y2="-230" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="340" y1="-240" x2="328" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="340" y1="-240" x2="352" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="420" cy="-200" r="6"/><line x1="420" y1="-194" x2="420" y2="-170" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="420" y1="-180" x2="408" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="420" y1="-180" x2="432" y2="-168" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
      <g><circle cx="500" cy="-260" r="6"/><line x1="500" y1="-254" x2="500" y2="-230" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="500" y1="-240" x2="488" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/><line x1="500" y1="-240" x2="512" y2="-228" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/></g>
    </g>
    <!-- The single RED figure at the center of the crowd -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2">
      <circle cx="-540" cy="-20" r="9"/>
      <line x1="-540" y1="-11" x2="-540" y2="20"/>
      <line x1="-540" y1="0" x2="-560" y2="20"/>
      <line x1="-540" y1="0" x2="-520" y2="20"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A crowd of 14 stick figures in graphite, scattered across the bottom. One figure is solid red — the protagonist who loves everyone. 480px mixed-case title dominates the top. The book is about loving everybody, always; the cover shows one figure standing distinct from the crowd because of that love.
